message:
fix: enable stop command to accept container name and fix error suggestions

Enhances the stop command usability and fixes incorrect error message suggestions:

Stop Command Improvements:
- Accept container name as first argument: `packnplay stop container-name`
- Maintain backward compatibility with --worktree flag approach
- Update usage and help text to reflect new capability
- Better error message when neither container name nor worktree provided

Error Message Fix:
- Use correct `packnplay stop container-name` syntax in suggestions
- Remove incorrect worktree-based stop command suggestions
- Show exact container name from container details for easy copy-paste

Before:
  packnplay stop --worktree=main  # Error: worktree flag required

After:
  packnplay stop packnplay-myproject-main  # Works correctly

The error message now suggests working commands that can be directly copied and executed.

🤖 Generated with Claude Code
